sections.heading: Options
sections.body:
| Option     | Type             | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | Necessity |
| ---------- | ---------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------- |
| background | boolean          | Flag to run command in the background. If omitted, defaults to false. When set to true, Atlas Data Federation runs the command in the background.\{ "background" : true }                                                                                                                                                              | Optional  |
| stores     | array of strings | Names of the stores for which to update the catalog. If omitted, Atlas Data Federation updates the catalog for all the stores in the storage configuration. If specified, Atlas Data Federation updates the catalog for the specified stores only. Atlas Data Federation returns an error if a specified store does not use a catalog. | Optional  |

sections.heading: Usage
sections.body:
To update the catalog for all the stores in the storage configuration,
run the following command:

```text
db.runCommand({ "updateCatalog" : 1 })
```

The previous command runs in the foreground and is similar to running
the command with `background` set to `false`.

To update the catalog for all the stores in the storage configuration
in the background, run the following command:

```text
db.runCommand({ "updateCatalog" : 1, "background" : true })
```

To update the catalog for a list of stores in the background, run the
following command:

```text
db.runCommand({ "updateCatalog" : 1, "stores": ["<storeName>",...], "background" : true })
```

sections.heading: Output
sections.body:
The command returns the following output:

```json
{ "ok" : 1 }
```

sections.heading: Example
sections.body:
The following command updates the namespace metadata in the catalog:

```json
db.runCommand({ "updateCatalog" : 1 })
```

The previous command returns the following output:

```json
{ "ok" : 1 }
```
